description: Bulk create user accounts in Moodle using the CSV file at '/home/ga/Documents/new_staff_upload.csv'. Log in as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). Configure the upload to add new users only (skipping existing), require the password field from the file, and disable forced password changes. Ensure the 5 staff members from the file are enrolled in the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course as indicated in the file.
